records.feeSummary: £7 each time a vehicle enters a terminal drop-off zone
records.penaltyNotes: £80 Parking Charge Notice for non-payment, reduced to £40 if paid within 14 days
records.paymentDeadline: Midnight the day after your visit (can also pay in advance or on the day)
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders can apply for a 100% discount using the vehicle registration number, up to 3 months in advance, during the trip, or by midnight the day after

freeAlternative.name: Park & Ride (formerly Long Stay)
freeAlternative.details: Up to 30 minutes free in Park & Ride car parks, with a free shuttle bus to the terminal doors every 15 minutes

records.feeSummary: £10 for up to 10 minutes, then £1 per additional minute (max charge £30, max stay 30 minutes)
records.penaltyNotes: £100 Parking Charge Notice for non-payment, reduced to £60 if paid within 14 days
records.paymentDeadline: Midnight the day after your visit
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders dropped off by friends or taxi are exempt from the charge if they register the vehicle number plate in advance (free 30-minute session)

freeAlternative.name: Long Stay car park
freeAlternative.details: Free for up to two hours, with a free shuttle bus to the terminals

records.feeSummary: £5 for up to 5 minutes, £6.40 up to 10 minutes, £25 up to 30 minutes
records.penaltyNotes: £100 Parking Charge for overstaying the 30-minute maximum or non-payment, reduced to £60 if paid within 14 days (plus debt-recovery fee of up to £70)
records.paymentDeadline: Midnight the day after you use the Drop Off Zone
records.blueBadgePolicy: The Drop Off Zone is free of charge where the passenger being dropped off holds a valid Blue Badge; the passenger must show the badge to a traffic marshal on entry (driver's badge does not qualify)

freeAlternative.name: JetParks 1 free drop-off
freeAlternative.details: Free drop-off area a little further from the terminals, with a free shuttle bus running 24/7 (journey takes a few minutes)

records.feeSummary: £10 for up to 15 minutes, £28 for stays over 15 minutes
records.penaltyNotes: £28 tier applies to stays over 15 minutes (from 19 March 2026); a Parking Charge may also be issued for non-payment — amount not currently published
records.blueBadgePolicy: Normal charges apply, but where the passenger holds a valid Blue Badge the driver is eligible for an extension to the 30-minute maximum stay if reasonably required

freeAlternative.name: Mid Stay car park free drop-off
freeAlternative.details: Free drop-off area at the Mid Stay car park with a free shuttle bus to the terminal

records.feeSummary: £7 for up to 10 minutes, then £1 per minute (max stay 30 minutes)
records.penaltyNotes: £95 enforcement charge for staying past 30 minutes, reduced to £55 if paid within 14 days
records.paymentDeadline: Midnight the day after your visit
records.blueBadgePolicy: No concessions are available for Blue Badge holders in the main Express Drop Off area

freeAlternative.name: Long Stay car park
freeAlternative.details: Free for up to two hours, with a free shuttle bus (around 10 minutes, every 20 minutes) to the terminal

records.feeSummary: £8.50 for up to 10 minutes, then £1 per minute
records.blueBadgePolicy: Vehicles carrying passengers with Blue Badges have free access to the car parks for one hour

records.feeSummary: Free for the first 10 minutes in the Drop Off car park; standard tariff applies thereafter
records.penaltyNotes: No return within one hour: returning before the hour is up forfeits the 10 minutes free
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders can use Premium Set Down free for the first 30 minutes, validated at the NCP Customer Service cabin with the Blue Badge and vehicle registration

freeAlternative.name: Drop Off car park (first 10 minutes free)
freeAlternative.details: No return within 1 hour. Stays over 10 minutes are charged at the standard tariff displayed at the car park entrance; pay (cashless) within 24 hours of exit

records.feeSummary: £7 for up to 15 minutes, then £1 per minute (£50 rate beyond 30 minutes)
records.penaltyNotes: £50 rate applies for stays over 30 minutes
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders get a 30-minute free drop-off & pick-up window in the Terminal Multi Storey car park (buzzer at exit barrier, badge required; not for commercial/hire use)

freeAlternative.name: Long Stay car park
freeAlternative.details: Free for up to one hour, with a free shuttle bus to the terminal

records.feeSummary: £8.50 for up to 10 minutes (Drop Off & Pick Up car park)
records.penaltyNotes: Red Route enforcement charge £100, reduced to £60 if paid within 14 days
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders: up to 40 minutes in the Drop Off & Pick Up car park for £8.50 — scan the badge at the exit barrier

freeAlternative.name: Waiting Zone
freeAlternative.details: Free for up to one hour while waiting, with a free shuttle bus to the terminal every 15 minutes from the adjacent car rental facility

records.feeSummary: £5 for up to 10 minutes (Drop Off Zone)
records.penaltyNotes: £60 for stays over 1 hour; payment at the coin/card machine on exit; cars must not be left unattended
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders can use the Short Stay Car Park free of charge for 30 minutes by validating the ticket with a car park team member; after 30 minutes a minimum £5 fee applies

records.feeSummary: £6 for up to 10 minutes (Express Pick Up & Drop Off car park)
records.penaltyNotes: Red Route no-stopping zones operate on airport roads
records.paymentDeadline: Ticketless ANPR — appropriate tariff is requested and paid on exit (from March 2026 card payments only at the barrier; cash only at designated cash payment machines)
records.blueBadgePolicy: Disabled parking bays are available in all car parks (including Express) and must display a valid Blue Badge; no specific Express drop-off fee concession is published online

freeAlternative.name: Airport Waiting Zone (Callerton Parkway)
freeAlternative.details: Free parking for up to 90 minutes at Callerton Parkway, with a free 24/7 shuttle bus to the terminal (departs every 30 minutes)

records.feeSummary: £6 for up to 10 minutes (Express Drop Off & Pick Up car park, facing the terminal)
records.penaltyNotes: Vehicles needing longer than 10 minutes are directed to the Multi Storey short-stay tariff; no discrete overstay penalty amount is published for the Express car park
records.paymentDeadline: Pay on exit at the barrier (pull up on the day, pay on leaving)
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders can claim up to 40 minutes free in the Express Drop-off area

records.feeSummary: £8 for up to 5 minutes, then £1 per minute (maximum stay 10 minutes); drop-off charge introduced 6 January 2026
records.penaltyNotes: After the first 5 minutes the charge is £1 per minute up to the 10-minute maximum stay; a Parking Charge may apply for non-payment but no amount is confirmed on the official page
records.paymentDeadline: Midnight the following day (online, barrierless ANPR)
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders are exempt from the drop-off charge (register/sign in to the drop-off system to apply the exemption)

records.feeSummary: £8 for up to 10 minutes (Pick Up & Drop Off car park, one-minute walk from the terminal)
records.paymentDeadline: Cashless — pay at the barrier on exit (SmoothPark automatic payment gives 10% off the standard tariff)
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders can use the dedicated Blue Badge bays in the Pick Up & Drop Off car park for up to 60 minutes for the £8 fee

freeAlternative.name: One Hour Free Zone
freeAlternative.details: Free for up to one hour, a 3–4 minute walk from the terminal; fully electric private cars may also use the Pick Up & Drop Off car park free for up to 1 hour (max 2 visits/day)

records.feeSummary: £5 for up to 15 minutes (Rapid Drop-off, barrier-free in front of the terminal)
records.penaltyNotes: £100 Parking Charge for overstaying the 30-minute maximum or non-payment, reduced to £60 if paid within 14 days, plus a debt-recovery fee of up to £70
records.paymentDeadline: Barrier-free — pay by 23:59 the day after your visit (online or by phone; payment cannot be made on exit)
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders get up to 30 minutes free at Short Stay 1 (nearest the terminal); general drivers pay £6 for up to 30 minutes there (£8 up to 1 hour). The 60-minute free drop-off/pick-up at Long Stay 2 is open to all drivers (see free alternative). No specific Blue Badge concession is published for the Rapid Drop-off area

freeAlternative.name: Long Stay 2 car park
freeAlternative.details: Free for up to 60 minutes for drop-off and pick-up, then £1 per minute. A 15-20 minute walk from the terminal, or take the free shuttle bus

records.feeSummary: £7 for up to 15 minutes (Express Drop Off), then £1 per minute
records.penaltyNotes: After 15 minutes the charge is £1 per minute; a flat £50 charge applies for staying beyond the 30-minute maximum
records.paymentDeadline: Card only — pay at the forecourt exit barrier (contactless accepted)
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders should not use Express Drop Off; they get a 30-minute free drop-off/pick-up window in the Short Stay car park (enter the 13-digit Blue Badge number at the exit; not for commercial, hire or reward)

freeAlternative.name: Long Stay car park
freeAlternative.details: Free for up to one hour, with a free shuttle bus to the terminal

records.feeSummary: £4 minimum for the first 10 minutes (Express Drop-Off & Pick-Up area)
records.penaltyNotes: Re-entering the Long Stay car park within 15 minutes incurs a minimum £8 charge
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders: up to 2 hours free in the Short Stay car park — validate the entry ticket with the badge at the Car Park Assistance Office

freeAlternative.name: Long Stay car park
freeAlternative.details: Take a ticket on entry and reinsert it at the exit barrier within 10 minutes to avoid a charge; longer stays are charged at £8 for up to one hour

records.feeSummary: £7 for up to 20 minutes (Pick Up & Drop Off, ground floor of the short stay car park)
records.penaltyNotes: £80 enforcement charge for non-compliance, reduced to £50 if paid within 14 days
records.paymentDeadline: Cashless — card, contactless, Apple Pay and Google Pay on exit
records.blueBadgePolicy: Standard charges apply to Blue Badge holders using Pick Up & Drop Off; Blue Badge holders get 30 minutes free in the Short Stay car park if the ticket is validated at customer service on exit

records.feeSummary: £3 for up to 10 minutes in the Drop Off Zone
records.penaltyNotes: Vehicles must not be left unattended and may be removed; 3–24 hours costs £50
records.blueBadgePolicy: Not specifically stated on the official page; a special assistance vehicle is available — check with the airport

freeAlternative.name: Car Park 2
freeAlternative.details: First 20 minutes free in Car Park 2; a special assistance vehicle is available for passengers with reduced mobility

records.feeSummary: £6 for up to 15 minutes in Car Park P1 (drop-off & pick-up bays opposite the Main Terminal)
records.penaltyNotes: P1 tariff continues beyond 15 minutes (15–60 min £7.50, then higher bands); overstay beyond a pre-booked period is charged at £20 per day or part thereof
records.paymentDeadline: Card / contactless / Apple Pay / Google Pay at the exit barrier
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders can stay in Car Park P1 for up to 4 hours for the current up-to-15-minutes rate (£6)

freeAlternative.name: Car Park P4 free drop-off
freeAlternative.details: Free for up to 30 minutes in Car Park P4 (then £2 for 30–60 minutes)

records.feeSummary: £8 for up to 10 minutes (Express Pick-up & Drop-off, directly opposite the terminal)
records.penaltyNotes: Red Route no-stopping zones: £100 charge if you stop, payable within 28 days
records.paymentDeadline: Midnight the following day (online, barrierless ANPR)
records.blueBadgePolicy: No specific Express drop-off Blue Badge concession is published online

records.feeSummary: £8 for up to 30 minutes (Car Park 1 Drop Off)
records.penaltyNotes: For stays over 30 minutes the standard (not-booked) CP1 tariff applies; a penalty may be payable for breaching the car park terms under airport byelaws (amount not published)
records.paymentDeadline: ANPR — pay on exit; cash and all major debit/credit cards accepted
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders use dedicated Pick Up & Drop Off spaces in CP1 and may stay up to 4 hours but are only charged the published up-to-30-minutes rate (£8)

records.feeSummary: £8 for up to 20 minutes in Car Park 1 (Short Stay) drop-off & pick-up
records.penaltyNotes: Beyond 20 minutes the Short Stay tariff continues (£15 for 20–60 minutes, then higher bands); overstay beyond a pre-booked period is charged at £30 per day or part thereof
records.paymentDeadline: Contactless, debit or credit cards only at the exit barriers / payment stations
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders can use the dedicated pick-up/drop-off spaces in Car Park 1 (Short Stay) for up to 4 hours for the current up-to-20-minutes rate, adjusted on validation at the parking office

records.feeSummary: Free for up to 15 minutes in the Short Stay drop-off area
records.blueBadgePolicy: Blue Badge holders and Special Assistance passengers: up to 20 minutes free in the Premium car park in front of the terminal

freeAlternative.name: Free Drop Off area (Short Stay car parks)
freeAlternative.details: Five-minute walk to the terminal; no return within one hour. Standard rates apply beyond 15 minutes (£3.90 up to 30 minutes, tariff from 1 June 2026)

records.feeSummary: £2.50 for up to 10 minutes, £5 for up to 1 hour, then £7 per hour (drop-off & pick-up area)
records.penaltyNotes: After the first hour the charge is £7 for every hour thereafter
records.blueBadgePolicy: No specific Blue Badge drop-off concession is published online

freeAlternative.name: Free parking with terminal spend
freeAlternative.details: Free parking for up to 2 hours when you spend a minimum of £5 in the Landside Café or landside terminal shops (receipt required for validation)
